mapper.insert: INSERT INTO item (item_name, category_id, unit_price, images, item_description, sale_status, priority, condition_level, original_price, seller_id, view_count, favorite_count, create_time, update_time, create_user, update_user) VALUES (#{itemName}, #{categoryId}, #{unitPrice}, #{images}, #{itemDescription}, #{saleStatus}, #{priority}, #{conditionLevel}, #{originalPrice}, #{sellerId}, #{viewCount}, #{favoriteCount}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, #{createUser}, #{updateUser})
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM item WHERE id IN
#{id}
mapper.update:
update item
item_name = #{itemName},
category_id = #{categoryId},
unit_price = #{unitPrice},
images = #{images},
item_description = #{itemDescription},
sale_status = #{saleStatus},
priority = #{priority},
condition_level = #{conditionLevel},
original_price = #{originalPrice},
view_count = #{viewCount},
favorite_count = #{favoriteCount},
update_time = #{updateTime},
update_user = #{updateUser},
where id = #{id}
mapper.select:
select count(id) from item
and sale_status = #{saleStatus}
